text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I are headed back to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for today. That was just the
break I needed.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, what's this? Look over there...

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Dear me... How will I ever cross?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An elderly woman with a big suitcase is standing
next to a crosswalk.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course. Excuse me, ma'am.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Thank you ever so much for your help, my dear. I
hope it wasn't too much trouble.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, no, think nothing of it.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
My, how polite you are... I'm glad to see there are
still Umamusume like you upholding the Yamato
Nadeshiko ideals.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you for the compliment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder bows until the lady is out of sight.
choice_data_list: She's right—you're such an upstanding soul.
She's right—you're such an upstanding soul.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you both flatter me too much... But thank
you, either way.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You know, when I first arrived here in Japan, I felt
like such a fish out of water.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It was really difficult to work out nuances
and keep up with the way people speak.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And I often tripped over my words, making it
difficult for others to understand me.
choice_data_list: Really? How did you sound back then?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmm, well... all right. It's a bit embarrassing, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"Good speaking, very hard. Long ago, I practice
many, then I come to school."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. How's that for an example? I won't be
doing that again.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I don't think I've come far enough to
be called a true Yamato Nadeshiko just yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This conversation has shown me a side of Grass
Wonder that I never knew about.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Not so much. My mother was well versed in
Japanese culture, and I often had Japanese food
while in the United States.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Although... There was one food that gave me
quite the surprise.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Authentic wasabi.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I had heard it was nothing like what we had at
home, but nothing could have prepared me for
that tingling fire in my nose.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I've come to enjoy it now, but it wasn't
easy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I don't think I've come far enough to
be called a true Yamato Nadeshiko just yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This conversation has shown me a side of Grass
Wonder that I never knew about.
